# Static wide-char ncurses built from the pristine submodule sources plus
# the pregenerated files in gen/ (see gen.sh). The source list is the
# NORMAL_OBJS set from a configured ncurses/Makefile — i.e. the
# termlib+ext_tinfo+base+widechar+ext_funcs modules, no ticlib/trace/
# driver/win32 — with the `.`-directory (generated) modules coming from
# gen/ncurses/.

set(nc "${THIRD_PARTY}/ncurses/ncurses")

add_library(ncursesw STATIC
    ${nc}/base/define_key.c
    ${nc}/base/key_defined.c
    ${nc}/base/keybound.c
    ${nc}/base/keyok.c
    ${nc}/base/legacy_coding.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_addch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_addstr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_beep.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_bkgd.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_box.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_chgat.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_clear.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_clearok.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_clrbot.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_clreol.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_color.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_colorset.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_delch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_delwin.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_dft_fgbg.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_echo.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_endwin.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_erase.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_flash.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_freeall.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_getch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_getstr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_hline.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_immedok.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_inchstr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_initscr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_insch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_insdel.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_insnstr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_instr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_isendwin.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_leaveok.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_mouse.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_move.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_mvwin.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_newterm.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_newwin.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_nl.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_overlay.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_pad.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_printw.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_redrawln.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_refresh.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_restart.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_scanw.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_screen.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_scroll.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_scrollok.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_scrreg.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_set_term.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slk.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkatr_set.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkatrof.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkatron.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkatrset.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkattr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkclear.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkcolor.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkinit.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slklab.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkrefr.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slkset.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_slktouch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_touch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_ungetch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_vline.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_wattroff.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_wattron.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_winch.c
    ${nc}/base/lib_window.c
    ${nc}/base/nc_panel.c
    ${nc}/base/new_pair.c
    ${nc}/base/resizeterm.c
    ${nc}/base/safe_sprintf.c
    ${nc}/base/tries.c
    ${nc}/base/use_window.c
    ${nc}/base/version.c
    ${nc}/base/vsscanf.c
    ${nc}/base/wresize.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/access.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/add_tries.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/alloc_ttype.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/comp_error.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/comp_hash.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/db_iterator.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/doalloc.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/entries.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/free_ttype.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/getenv_num.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/hashed_db.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/home_terminfo.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/init_keytry.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_acs.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_baudrate.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_cur_term.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_data.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_has_cap.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_kernel.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_longname.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_napms.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_options.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_print.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_raw.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_setup.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_termcap.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_termname.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_tgoto.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_ti.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_tparm.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_tputs.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/lib_ttyflags.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/name_match.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/obsolete.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/read_entry.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/read_termcap.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/strings.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/trim_sgr0.c
    ${nc}/tinfo/use_screen.c
    ${nc}/trace/lib_trace.c
    ${nc}/trace/varargs.c
    ${nc}/trace/visbuf.c
    ${nc}/tty/hardscroll.c
    ${nc}/tty/hashmap.c
    ${nc}/tty/lib_mvcur.c
    ${nc}/tty/lib_tstp.c
    ${nc}/tty/lib_twait.c
    ${nc}/tty/lib_vidattr.c
    ${nc}/tty/tty_update.c
    ${nc}/widechar/charable.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_add_wch.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_box_set.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_cchar.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_erasewchar.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_get_wch.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_get_wstr.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_hline_set.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_in_wch.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_in_wchnstr.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_ins_wch.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_inwstr.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_key_name.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_pecho_wchar.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_slk_wset.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_unget_wch.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_vid_attr.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_vline_set.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_wacs.c
    ${nc}/widechar/lib_wunctrl.c
    gen/ncurses/codes.c
    gen/ncurses/comp_captab.c
    gen/ncurses/comp_userdefs.c
    gen/ncurses/expanded.c
    gen/ncurses/fallback.c
    gen/ncurses/lib_gen.c
    gen/ncurses/lib_keyname.c
    gen/ncurses/names.c
    gen/ncurses/unctrl.c
)

target_include_directories(ncursesw
    PUBLIC
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gen/include"
        "${THIRD_PARTY}/ncurses/include"
    PRIVATE
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gen/ncurses"
        "${nc}"
)

# mirrors the configured Makefile's CPPFLAGS/CFLAGS (HAVE_CONFIG_H selects
# ncurses_cfg.h; there is no config.h)
target_compile_definitions(ncursesw PRIVATE
    HAVE_CONFIG_H
    BUILDING_NCURSES
    _POSIX_C_SOURCE=199506L
    NDEBUG
)
target_compile_options(ncursesw PRIVATE -Qunused-arguments)
